title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO MAT-I IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DULAG, PROVINCE OF LEYTE, TO PRESIDENT ROXAS.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5449 / 53 OG No. 16, 5149 (August 31, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1726, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO MAT-I IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DULAG, PROVINCE OF LEYTE, TO PRESIDENT ROXAS.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of barrio Mat-i in the Municipality of Dulag, Province of Leyte, is hereby changed to President Roxas.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
